---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<div class="page-wrap">

<p class="section-header">Publications</p>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-title">Interactive Educational Device for the Visually Impaired Using Refreshable Braille Display</div>
<div class="pub-venue">IEEE ICONAT 2023 — International Conference on Advancement in Nanoelectronics and Telecommunication</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Keertana Vajjhala et al. · Available on IEEE Xplore</div>
</div>

<br>

> More publications and technical write-ups coming soon.

</div>
